title: ceropegia variegata var. cornigera
intro: Ceropegia variegata var. cornigera, commonly known as the 'bearded string of hearts', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Ceropegia variegata var. cornigera are used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
